ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:User {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[r1:POSTS]->(b:Tweet {import_method: 'api'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:SIMILAR_TO {score: >0.7}]->(c:User {name: 'DataAnalyst'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r3:USING]->(d:Source {name: 'TechHub'})-[r4:RETWEETS]->(e:Tweet {text: 'Key insights!'})-[r5:MENTIONS]->(f:Me {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question:
How does the engagement pattern of "DataAnalyst" compare to TechExplorer’s retweet activity, particularly when amplified through "TechHub" and involving their own mentions?

Or:

What trends in retweet amplification from TechHub’s content did "DataAnalyst" engage with most frequently, and how does their follower count influence this dynamic?

cypher: MATCH (da:User {screen_name: "DataAnalyst"})-[:AMPLIFIES]->(th:User {screen_name: "TechHub"}),       (te:User {screen_name: "TechExplorer"})-[:POSTS]->(t:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(rt:Tweet),       (da)-[:POSTS]->(d:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(rt2:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(te)\nRETURN da.screen_name AS DataAnalyst, th.screen_name AS TechHub, te.screen_name AS TechExplorer,       COUNT(rt) AS RetweetCount, SUM(da.followers) AS DataAnalystFollowers\nORDER BY RetweetCount DESC
